title: replace pitch app with slidev presentation
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Slidev into the future
gist.blurb: Swapped the React boilerplate for a slick Slidev deck. Our pitch is now written in Markdown, just like our docs.
gist.summary: Replaced the custom React pitch app with a Slidev presentation generated from Markdown.
gist.impact: The project's vision and roadmap are now easier to maintain and version control directly in the repo.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot standing on a small stage pointing at a projection screen with a pixelated chart. The robot is in the front row holding a '10/10' sign.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the bee mascot presenting a chart on a projection screen to a small audience. The robot companion holds a sign saying '10'. Lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.
